description: Feature workflow — leader plans, peers implement, leader verifies. Plan, audit-the-plan, checkpoint, peer-handoff(implement), verify-plan, audit pipeline (includes test-coverage; leader writes missing tests in-line via the decision loop), run tests.

phases.name: plan-review
phases.summary: Plan + plan-quality-review findings ready. User reviews. Resume to dispatch implementation to peers.

phases.name: implement
phases.directive: Implement the plan in artifacts/plan.md. Decompose into independent tasks (per file scope or per implementation step) and dispatch to available peers. Run any tasks yourself if no peers are available.
